word: H8497 - תָּכָה - tâkâh - taw-kaw' - Sit down

sections.paragraph:
Original: תּכה

Transliteration: tâkâh

Phonetic: taw-kaw'

BDB Definition:

  1. (Pual) to be led, be assembled
    1. meaning wholly dubious
  2. (CLBL) (Pu) to lay down, recline

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 2507

Part(s) of speech: Verb
